ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code for the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state (people per square mile) */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gun_violence" (
  "gun_violence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gun violence record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the violence occurred */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "murders" INTEGER /* Number of murders in the state */,
  "gun_murders" INTEGER /* Number of gun murders in the state */,
  "non_fatal_injuries" INTEGER /* Number of non-fatal injuries from gun violence */,
  "total_incidents" INTEGER /* Total number of gun-related incidents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gun_violence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gun_violence_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gun_ownership" (
  "gun_ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gun ownership record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the ownership rate applies */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "gun_ownership_rate" REAL /* Gun ownership rate in the state (percentage of households owning a gun) */,
  "households_with_guns" INTEGER /* Number of households that own guns */,
  "total_households" INTEGER /* Total number of households in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gun_ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gun_ownership_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_rates" (
  "crime_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime rate record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the crime rate applies */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "violent_crime_rate" REAL /* Violent crime rate in the state (per 100,000 inhabitants) */,
  "property_crime_rate" REAL /* Property crime rate in the state (per 100,000 inhabitants) */,
  "total_crimes" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes reported in the state */,
  "rape_rate" REAL /* Rate of rape crimes in the state (per 100,000 inhabitants) */,
  "robbery_rate" REAL /* Rate of robbery crimes in the state (per 100,000 inhabitants) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_rates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poverty_rates" (
  "poverty_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poverty rate record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the poverty rate applies */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the state (percentage of population below poverty line) */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income in the state */,
  "households_below_poverty" INTEGER /* Number of households below the poverty line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poverty_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poverty_rates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the education statistics apply */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "high_school_graduation_rate" REAL /* High school graduation rate in the state (percentage) */,
  "bachelor_degree_or_higher" REAL /* Percentage of population with a bachelor's degree or higher */,
  "public_school_students" INTEGER /* Number of students in public schools */,
  "private_school_students" INTEGER /* Number of students in private schools */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "data_import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source from which the data was imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file imported */,
  "imported_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who performed the import */,
  "imported_records" INTEGER /* Number of records successfully imported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_imported_by FOREIGN KEY ("imported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)
